author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Plan: re-point crosslink container build (and start/snapshot/staleness check, since they share the same constants) to compose with kickoff. Concrete: change IMAGE_NAME from 'crosslink-agent' to 'ghcr.io/forecast-bio/crosslink-agent' so all container.rs subcommands look up + produce the same image name kickoff defaults to. Change build()'s default --tag from IMAGE_TAG ('latest') to a new BUILD_DEFAULT_TAG ('local') so a local rebuild doesn't accidentally clobber a pulled :latest. Update the stale-image warning text to reference docker pull / just build-image rather than just 'crosslink container build'. Update CLI help on the --tag flag. Add a unit test asserting the GHCR-namespaced image name is used. Single follow-up commit on the same feature branch.
